ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session of the exam (e.g., Morning, Afternoon) */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester of the exam */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code of the subject */,
  "branch_code" INTEGER /* Code of the branch */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "max_marks" REAL /* Maximum marks for the exam */,
  "min_passing_marks" REAL /* Minimum passing marks for the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., Midterm, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_subject_code FOREIGN KEY ("subject_code") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_branch_code FOREIGN KEY ("branch_code") REFERENCES branches ("branch_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code of the subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the subject */,
  "prerequisite_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite subject, if any */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_code" INTEGER /* Code of the branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the student belongs to */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Current semester of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student registering for the exam */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam being registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Registered, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration the result belongs to */,
  "marks" REAL /* Marks obtained by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Passed, Failed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the faculty member belongs to */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date of joining the faculty */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question paper */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who uploaded the paper */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam the paper belongs to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file where the question paper is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the question paper (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_papers_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_papers_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam schedule */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam the schedule belongs to */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session of the exam */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the exam will be held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the exam */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_schedules_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being enrolled */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester of enrollment */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
